name: D-Power (Season 3 Digivice)
effect: Must be equipped to digivolve your partner or use the Card Slash system. Required to slash Modify Cards — without the D-Power equipped cards cannot be used. Glows when Wild Ones — unpartnered Digimon — are within 6 spaces. As a Free Action, scan one visible Digimon to learn their Attribute and Element. As a Basic Action, perform a deep scan to learn Attribute, Element, and one combat stat of your choice. The D-Power supports digivolution up to Mega stage and is required for Biomerge Digivolution. Older Digivices do not work with the Season 3 Card Slash system.
notes: Required for Card Slash and Biomerge. Cap: Mega.
